text:
```json
{
  "type": "DRAG_FILL",
  "title": "Uncovering Hidden Needs",
  "lessonText": "Master the art of identifying customer needs with targeted questions and active listening.",
  "data": {
    "challenges": [
      {
        "instruction": "Complete the question to uncover the customer's primary writing needs.",
        "codeTemplate": "What are you hoping to ___ with a pen?",
        "options": [
          "achieve",
          "write",
          "do",
          "accomplish"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "accomplish",
        "explanation": "This question directly addresses what the customer wants to achieve, revealing their underlying needs."
      },
      {
        "instruction": "Fill in the blank to understand the customer's current writing tool preferences.",
        "codeTemplate": "What do you typically ___ in a pen?",
        "options": [
          "look for",
          "dislike",
          "use",
          "enjoy"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "look for",
        "explanation": "Understanding their preferences helps tailor your pitch to match their ideal pen characteristics."
      },
      {
        "instruction": "Complete the sentence to explore the customer's past experiences with pens.",
        "codeTemplate": "Have you ever had a pen that ___ you?",
        "options": [
          "helped",
          "failed",
          "inspired",
          "frustrated"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "frustrated",
        "explanation": "This question uncovers pain points, allowing you to position your pen as a solution to those frustrations."
      },
      {
        "instruction": "Complete the question to gauge the importance of specific pen features.",
        "codeTemplate": "How important is ___ to you in a pen?",
        "options": [
          "comfort",
          "color",
          "price",
          "style"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "comfort",
        "explanation": "Focusing on specific features helps prioritize your sales pitch based on what the customer values most."
      }
    ]
  }
}
```
